name: devflow_diagnose_stage
description: DevFlow plugin expert skill: diagnoses why a stage failed by correlating validation_report.json, artifact_validation_layer.json, and source_artifacts/ manifests. Returns a structured action recommendation.
capabilities: identify if failure is missing source_artifact vs execution error vs Unity path issue
cross-reference source_id requirements per stage from HANDOFF.md mapping
suggest concrete remediation steps specific to DevFlow governance rules
anti_patterns: do not create source_artifacts without package_manifest.json
do not retry stage without resolving missing_groups first
